name: Securities issues statistics (ESA)
description_short: Securities issuance statistics based on the European System of Accounts (ESA 2010) framework, covering stocks and flows of debt securities by issuing sector, providing a national accounts-consistent view of financial markets.
use_cases: What is the total stock of debt securities issued by the government sector in ESA terms?
How do securities issuance flows compare to GDP across euro area countries?
What is the ESA 2010-consistent breakdown of securities by issuing sector?
